title: Square Root Symbol: Copy & Paste √ Radical Signs
meta_description: Copy and paste the square root symbol (√) plus cube root, fourth root, exponents, and related operators. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The square root sign (√) and the radical, exponent, and operator characters that go with it. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The square root, or radical, sign denotes roots in mathematics. This library gathers the square, cube, and fourth-root signs along with superscript exponents and the operators most often used beside them.

sections.label: Radicals
sections.intro: The square, cube, and fourth-root radical characters.

sections.label: Exponents
sections.intro: Superscript characters for writing exponents and powers inline.

sections.label: Operators
sections.intro: Operators commonly written alongside roots and powers.
